nasb.text: The Lord has issued a command concerning you: “Your name will no longer be perpetuated. I will cut off idol and image From the house of your gods. I will prepare your grave, For you are contemptible.”

esv.text: The Lord has given commandment about you: “No more shall your name be perpetuated; from the house of your gods I will cut off the carved image and the metal image. I will make your grave, for you are vile.”

cnv.text: 尼尼微啊！ 耶和華已經向你下了命令： 你的名字必不再傳於後世； 我必從你的神廟中， 除掉雕刻和鑄造的偶像； 我必為你預備墳墓， 因為你沒有存在的價值。

ccb.text: 尼尼微啊， 耶和华已发出有关你的命令： “你的名不会传于后世。 我要摧毁你神庙中雕刻和铸造的偶像。 我要为你掘好坟墓， 因为你毫无用处。”
